title: Olivia
writer: Dorothy Bussy, Colette Audry, Pierre Laroche
actors: Edwige Feuillère, Simone Simon, Marie-Claire Olivia
plot: Late nineteenth century in a finishing school for young girls near in France, the principal, the fascinating Miss Julie, sows confusion in the heart of the newcomer, Olivia.
